response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video: 00:00-03:13 intro, 03:14-05:03 performance. 2. Identified song '快眠! 安眠! スヤリスト生活', composer Shun Nitta-me (HANO), performer Shirogane Noel. 3. Searched for lyrics using Japanese title and composer. 4. Found full lyrics. 5. Mapped scenes and created JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introduction to Shirogane Noel's 3D live event, '3D新衣装お披露目', followed by a performance of the song '快眠! 安眠! スヤリスト生活'.

scenes.description: Introductory screens and title cards for Shirogane Noel's 3D live event.
Shirogane Noel performs the song '快眠! 安眠! スヤリスト生活' in her 3D model.
scenes.song_title: 快眠! 安眠! スヤリスト生活
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目指せよ快眠
勝ち取れ安眠
いざ夢の世界へ
理想の眠りを求めて
さあ始めよう
(ノンレム睡眠レム睡眠)

私は囚われの姫
魔王の城の中で
独り閉じ込められては
毎日ひたすらに眠ってます
今宵も
布団に入り
栖夜スヤリスト生活
枕もシーツも
硬くて眠れない
(君も寝具にしてやろうか!)

目指せよ快眠
勝ち取れ安眠
いざ夢の世界へ
ふかふかの枕手に入れて
この疲れ癒したい
恐れず前進
ほぐせよ全身
瞼を閉じたなら
すべすべのシーツの上で
さあ始めよう
(ノンレム睡眠レム睡眠)

私は囚われの姫
悲鳴が響く夜に
一人で檻を抜け出し
今日もお散歩へと
行ってきます
幾多の試練を越えて
新たな寝具の元へ
マグマで、猛毒で
死んでも眠りたい
(城ごと寝具にしてやろうか!)

掴めよ快眠
疲れて安眠
いざ夢の向こうへ
ハイテク目覚まし手に入れて
気持ちよく目覚めたい
まだまだ前進
華麗に変身
ごはんを食べたなら
魔法のベッドにダイブして
さあ始めよう
明日はもっと
今日よりずっと
いい夢みれるかな
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Aim for sound sleep
Win peaceful sleep
Let's go to the dream world
Seeking the ideal sleep
Come on, let's start
(Non-REM sleep, REM sleep)

I am a captive princess
Inside the Demon King's castle
Locked away alone
Sleeping earnestly every day
Tonight again
I crawl into the futon
Suyas's Sleepy Life
Both the pillow and the sheets
Are hard, I can't sleep
(Shall I turn you into bedding too!)

Aim for sound sleep
Win peaceful sleep
Let's go to the dream world
Getting a fluffy pillow
I want to heal this fatigue
Advance without fear
Loosen up your whole body
Once you close your eyelids
On the smooth sheets
Come on, let's start
(Non-REM sleep, REM sleep)

I am a captive princess
In a night where screams echo
Escaping the cage alone
And going for a walk today too
I'm off
Overcoming many trials
Towards new bedding
With magma, with deadly poison
I want to sleep even if I die
(Shall I turn the whole castle into bedding!)

Grab sound sleep
Get tired and sleep peacefully
Let's go beyond dreams
Getting a high-tech alarm clock
I want to wake up feeling good
Still advancing
Transforming beautifully
Once I've eaten my meal
Diving into a magic bed
Come on, let's start
Will I be able to have
Even better dreams tomorrow
Than today
